heading: Investment of the Fund
label: 8528 Investment of the Fund
text: Money in the Fund not required for current disbursements may be invested and reinvested by the Secretary of the Treasury in interest-bearing obligations of the United States or in obligations guaranteed as to both principal and interest by the United States.
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–40section 5228 of this title
amendments: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–40section 5228 of this title
